arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Garnacho to Tottenham? Spurs eye Man United star
arts.sum: Man United's Alejandro Garnacho has reportedly heard from Chelsea, Napoli and now Tottenham. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur transfer update: 'Agreement' in place for January window signing of former Chelsea player
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly reach an agreement for the signature of a former Chelsea player, with Ange Postecoglou looking to reinforce his squad in January window.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou explains how Tottenham can still convince players to join after Mathys Tel snub
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou believes there is plenty to convince other new signings to join Tottenham in the final days of the January transfer window after Mathys Tel turned down the club. With Spurs in 15th place in the Premier League and speaking before the news that Tel had rejected the north London club, Postecoglou was asked whether it was tough to persuade players to join the club at this point.

arts.ttl: Brentford v Tottenham: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Brentford v Tottenham: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank delivers mixed Brentford injury update: Three players passed fit for Tottenham clash as Rico Henry misses out
arts.sum: Brentford head coach Thomas Frank provides a mixed injury update ahead of Sunday's Premier League meeting with Tottenham Hotspur at the Gtech Community Stadium.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou bemoans discord at Spurs amid anti-Levy chants
arts.sum: ‘I have probably failed in trying to unify the club’ Manager without nine players for Sunday’s Brentford trip Ange Postecoglou has said the last thing he wanted at Tottenham was a lack of harmony as he addressed the anti-Daniel Levy chants from a section of the fanbase and battled to turn around the club’s Premier League fortunes. Spurs go to Brentford on Sunday having taken five points from their past 11 matches, a run that has dropped them to 15th and led some supporters to call for the departure of Levy, the chairman of 24 years’ standing. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Tottenham still attractive for new signings - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou insists Tottenham remains an attractive proposition for new players and says the club is "exploring some opportunities" before the transfer deadline.

arts.ttl: Still a big club – Ange Postecoglou says Spurs remain attractive for new players
arts.sum: Tottenham are in desperate need of reinforcements with nine players still absent for Sunday’s trip to Brentford.

arts.ttl: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou insists his side can 'relaunch' their dismal campaign... as a host of injured stars gear up for an imminent return
arts.sum: Tottenham are just a fortnight away from a major reset that their under pressure Ange manager Postecoglou believes can relaunch their ailing season.

arts.ttl: Sources: Mathys Tel rejects chance to join Spurs
arts.sum: Tel has informed Bayern of his intention to explore new opportunities in the January transfer window and sources told ESPN that Spurs had a €60 million ($62.5m) offer for the player accepted by the Bundesliga giants on Thursday. Tottenham Hotspur's hopes of bolstering their injury-depleted squad were dented on Friday after Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel rejected the opportunity to join Ange Postecoglou's side, sources have told ESPN.
